name: Fat Mable
description:
Art by better with salt

Mable was a member of Team Flare until it disbanded, and she took a plea deal to be an acting director of the Pokémon Research Lab so the government could monitor her. As she is not allowed to leave the building and is allowed to eat whatever she wants, she has gained a signifcant amount of weight since she was in Team Flare.

Her appearance has changed a lot in her clothing as she has discarded her Team Flare outfit for a white lab coat, a black long-sleeve dress with yellow and red circle crisscross patterning, opaque black tights or stockings, gray and white shoes with heels, though she keeps her teal-blue tie from her original outfit. Her hairstyle has changed slightly with her oval-shaped pigtails now placed lower and behind her ears, her lipstick is now red instead of teal-blue, and she now wears a pair of see through glasses reminiscent of lab goggles, revealing her eyes which are the same shade as her hair and tie. She also has a white Rotom Phone which she uses to conduct her work on. She is obese.
creator: unph
